requiredInputs: FEEDBACK_LOG.md or FUNNEL_MODEL.md when iteration or growth is in scope
HANDOFF.md when switching sessions, roles, delegated agents, AFK execution, compaction, or recovery

engineeringDiscipline.branchFinish: PR, merge, keep, or discard with fresh verification

review.specCompliance: Check output against the unit goal, spec, and allowed scope first.
review.codeQuality: Check simplicity, maintainability, tests, and integration second.

recovery: If verification is missing or ambiguous, mark RECOVERY_REQUIRED and create PFO_RECOVERY.md.
